narrative:
Amberley A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 845 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
